title: stachys palustris var. cordata
intro: Stachys palustris var. cordata, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family, characterized by its square stem and heart-shaped leaves. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a popular remedy for soothing skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and even acting as an antiviral agent. Wood Betony can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
